experiences.description: Specialist engineer within the Cyber Intelligence Team, EC3 centre, specialised in advanced malware analysis.
highlights: Technical lead of EMAS (Europol Malware Analysis Solution), a large-scale European malware analysis platform used by law enforcement agencies
Advanced reverse engineering of malware to analyse attack techniques and extract configurations in the context of international criminal cases
Cryptographic and logic vulnerability research and development of ransomware decryption tools (NoMoreRansom initiative)
Design of automated analysis tools (triage, unpacking, behavioural analysis)

experiences.description: Cybercrime engineer within the specialised cyber support group, cyber investigations division, anti-cybercrime office, specialised in digital forensics and malware analysis.
highlights: In-depth reverse engineering of ransomware families. Research and analysis of cryptographic and logic vulnerabilities in malware strains
Design and development of decryption tools enabling data recovery for victims
Malware analysis, digital forensics and incident response expertise on over 30 complex cases

experiences.description: Cybersecurity engineer within the mobile team, Research & Development division, specialised in vulnerability research in the Apple ecosystem.
highlights: Vulnerability research on macOS kernel, browsers (WebKit, Chrome) and iOS/Android applications
Public talk on JavaScript engine exploitation
Fuzzing, reverse engineering, analysis and exploit development

experiences.description: Cybersecurity engineer within the P2A team, Product Research & Development division, specialised in malware analysis sandbox development and malware reverse engineering.
highlights: Design and development of a hypervisor-level malware sandbox, stealthy and resistant to evasion techniques
Technical supervision of a small research team

experiences.description: Cybersecurity engineer within the penetration testing team, specialised in reverse engineering and vulnerability research.
highlights: Development of offensive tools and low-level binary protections (packers) for penetration testing engagements
Internal and external penetration testing engagements
